title: Suffix/pronoun hover decision
description: A token-addressed decision for the 'stem recognized + enclitic pronoun' class — a NOUN stem + a possessive enclitic (أَعْمَالُنَا = أعمال 'deeds' + نا 'our' -> 'our deeds'). It is a specialization of hover-token-decision: same per-quran:S:A:W override, plus the parsed stem/suffix/possessor and a POS gate. The possessive composition is valid ONLY on a noun; on a verb the enclitic is a subject/object pronoun ('we knew', not 'our knowledge'), so verb tokens are excluded. Public/runtime export record stays {src:'qamus',kind:'authored',lang:'en'}.

gloss.description: possessor + base, e.g. 'our deeds', 'their hearts', 'your Lord'

surface.description: vocalized token (the disambiguator for the enclitic)

stem.description: the noun stem after stripping the enclitic

lang.description: Required for public/runtime export; legacy internal mirrors may omit it.
